derivation: sigil = DragRaceSigil paths scaled 4x to a 320x320 viewBox; facade lifts the same vocabulary (gable + scallop-pink crown fan + radiating apex rays + jewel-strand) into the 1200x800 four-slot grammar.

grammar.pediment: scallop-pink crown fan filling gable with 5 radiating rays from apex and a central crown jewel
grammar.frieze: horizontal jewel-strand: 13 large primary beads alternating with 12 small ink-outlined beads on a faint baseline
grammar.columns: 5 columns — flanking 4 are spotlight-poles (slim ink shaft + primary bulb-circle near top with 4 light-rays), center is the jewel-strand (vertical alternating filled/outlined beads on a faint spine)
grammar.ornaments: ground baseline at y=772/780 with 4 small five-point crown silhouettes dispersed between columns + 2 ink dots at edges

primary_on_default_paper.note: primary on global #0E0B08 (tokens paper-0): passes — primary stays legible on the show-index page

warnings: sigil.svg has an opaque background rect (#2D0B2A) baked in so the file renders standalone; on a page wrapped with the dragrace palette CSS vars the rect harmonizes with the wrapper
facade.svg likewise carries an opaque paper rect — drop or override via CSS if a transparent variant is needed later
5-column composition chosen over 3 because the show 'is loud in the only color it permits itself' — the four spotlight-poles flanking a beaded center column read as a stage runway
